data.name: label8.Text
data.value:
Every blood donation can help save up to *three lives*. Donated blood is essential for:
* Emergency cases and accidents * Surgeries * Patients with chronic illnesses
Your donation can make a real difference.

data.name: label6.Text
data.value: * *O- is the universal donor* and can be given to almost anyone. It is very rare and always in high demand. * *AB+ is the universal recipient* and can receive blood from all types. * *O+ is the most common blood type*, making it frequently needed. * Negative blood types are less common and especially valuable in emergencies.
